parsed.availability_comment: Recent reports are aligned that he will miss the start of IPL 2026 due to ongoing rehab for hamstring/Achilles issues, but later tournament availability is still expected once cleared.
parsed.availability_note: Not cleared for opening phase as of March 17, 2026; opener and likely opening few matches at risk pending Cricket Australia medical clearance.
parsed.followup_reason: Medical clearance date is still unresolved; reports say he will miss the opener and possibly the opening few matches, but exact return game is unconfirmed.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Preferred overseas quick in RCB's strongest XI.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: If fit he occupies an overseas slot immediately; Jacob Duffy/Nuwan Thushara are contingency pace options only while he is unavailable.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: First-choice overseas strike seamer when cleared; only absence risk is fitness.
